experience.description: Developed an efficient hybrid retrieval architecture for a RAG-based chatbot, combining ChromaDB for vector and Rank BM25 for keyword search. Implemented a re-ranking mechanism with FlagEmbedding to ensure high-quality, relevant information for GPT-4 answer generation.

Developed a comprehensive Computer Vision project for multi-object tracking. Managed the full ML pipeline, including data preprocessing (MOT17 to YOLO format) and fine-tuning a pre-trained YOLOv8 model for object detection.

Independently developed a deep learning model for automated poem generation. Involved data collection, preprocessing, PyTorch model training, and integration of special tokens and temperature sampling for creative verse generation.

Applied Traditional Machine Learning techniques for traffic sign detection. Used OpenCV for image processing, extracted features, and trained an SVM classifier with Scikit-learn to categorize traffic signs.
